nasb.text: The highways are desolate, the traveler has ceased, He has broken the covenant, he has despised the cities, He has no regard for man.

esv.text: The highways lie waste; the traveler ceases. Covenants are broken; cities are despised; there is no regard for man.

cnv.text: 大路荒涼，過路的人絕跡； 敵人背約，藐視約章， 不尊重任何人。

ccb.text: 大路荒凉，行人绝迹。 条约被废，城邑被弃， 人民遭藐视。

csbs.text: 大道荒凉，行人绝迹； 约被破坏，城被厌弃， 人也不被重视。
